name: Peppermint Patties
recipeInstructions:
Cream margarine until light and fluffy. Gradually add sugar, beating until well combined.
Add egg and peppermint extract, mixing thoroughly.
Mix flour, baking powder, and salt; stir in the dough just until blended.
Divide dough into two halves. Add a few drops of red food coloring to one half and knead until evenly distributed. Leave the other half uncolored or color it green with food coloring.
Wrap both halves separately and refrigerate until firm.
Divide each portion in half again. On floured wax paper, roll out white dough into an 8-inch square.
Invert one sheet over the red sheet and roll firmly into a tight jellyroll shape, removing the paper as you go.
Repeat with the other two portions.
Cover and chill for about 30 minutes.
Cut dough into 1/4 inch slices and place on an ungreased baking sheet.
Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
